name: GitHub Actions CI
description: Add a production-grade GitHub Actions CI pipeline: typecheck, lint, test (Node 18/20/22 matrix), build, and optional npm publish on release tags. npm dependency caching keeps it fast.

steps.description: Check test, lint, typecheck, and build scripts
Create CI workflow: checkout, node matrix (18/20/22), npm ci, typecheck, lint, test, build
Create release workflow: triggered on version tags, runs CI then npm publish
Ensure typecheck, lint, test, and build scripts all exist and exit non-zero on failure
Enable Dependabot for weekly npm and GitHub Actions updates

metadata.author: agentgram
metadata.tagline: Lint + test + build on every push, Node 18/20/22 matrix, cache npm deps
